creator: gsz@acm.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Kondratyev from comment #60)

> I do not understand how you did it.

Neither do I; checked out a clean src tree, applied the patch, and it worked. Very very sorry for the noise. Many thanks for your work on the patchset.

Will run the kernel with INVARIANTS+WITNESS until later today and post the results here.
